name: Twin Distraction
description:
Requirements You are wielding two melee weapons, each in a different hand.

Your movements with two weapons are so swift and disorienting that they befuddle your opponent. When using , if both your Strikes deal damage to a targeted creature, the target must succeed at a @Check[will|against:rogue] saving throw against your class DC or become Stupefied 1 until the end of your next turn.
